class.name: ASAttributeValue
class.brief_description: Stores base and current values for attributes.
class.description:
ASAttributeValue maintains both the base value and current modified value of an attribute. The base value represents the original value before modifiers, while the current value reflects all active modifications.
Key features: - Base value preservation for modifier calculations - Current value tracking for runtime attribute access - Difference calculation for effect magnitude - Serialization support for state management
Used by ASAttributeSet to store attribute values and by the effect system to calculate and apply attribute modifications.

method.name: set_base
method.description: Sets both base and current values to the specified value. Used when resetting attributes or setting initial values.

method.name: set_current
method.description: Sets only the current value, preserving the base value. Used by modifiers to apply changes without affecting the base.

method.name: get_difference
method.description: Returns the difference between current and base values. Positive values indicate increases, negative values indicate decreases.

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the attribute value to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads attribute value from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: The original value before any modifiers are applied.
The current value after all modifiers are applied.
